app.name: Orca
app.one_liner: Orca is a cross-platform IDE that orchestrates multiple AI coding agents across isolated Git worktrees, enabling parallel development without branch conflicts.

screens.name: Main Worktree Dashboard
screens.purpose: Displays active worktrees with associated AI agents, terminals, and GitHub context; enables switching, editing, and monitoring agent activity.

rust_commands.name: run_ai_agent
rust_commands.purpose: Launches a specified AI agent (e.g., Claude Code, Codex) in a new terminal pane within the current worktree.

rust_commands.name: switch_worktree
rust_commands.purpose: Switches the active worktree context while preserving terminal sessions and UI state.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add basic diff viewer and commit interface
week 1: Implement worktree isolation with Git
week 1: Integrate multi-pane terminal supporting agent execution
acceptance_tests: PDF preview panel displays sufficient vertical space for navigation.
Right-click in Windows terminal pastes clipboard content instead of opening context menu.
When user switches worktrees, browser tabs do not reload unnecessarily.
